page_subtitle: Choose the offer that fits the number of WhatsApp groups you manage.
syncing_text: Whappi is verifying the active plan for this account.
banner_text_renew: Renew your plan to restart Whappi automations.
banner_text_starter: Includes: 3 groups - link blocking - manual forbidden words.
banner_text_pro: Includes: 6 groups - presets - AI assistant - scheduled messages.
banner_text_business: Includes: 16 groups - advanced features - deeper administration.
reminder_badge: Reminders D-7, D-3, D-1, and D-Day
plans_subtitle: Trial to validate, Starter to moderate, Pro IA to go further, Business to scale.
custom_text: For agencies, sales networks, or multi-country operations, we can tailor sessions, volumes, and tracking.
pricing_page_subtitle: 7-day free trial with 1 group, then three simple plans to protect, automate, and scale.
landing_pricing_title: Simple plans to protect your WhatsApp groups
landing_pricing_subtitle: Start with a concrete trial, move to simple moderation, then add AI and more power as your groups grow.
landing_pricing_trial_note: 7-day free trial with 1 group to see Whappi moderate before paying.
plan_trial_description: Connect 1 group and verify that Whappi moderates in a real situation.
plan_trial_footer: The simplest way to validate your first group
plan_starter_description: Moderate simply across up to 3 groups with essential rules.
plan_pro_description: Go further with AI across up to 6 groups.
plan_pro_footer: The best balance point for growth
plan_pro_feature_4: AI assistant to help the admin
plan_business_description: For teams that want more power across up to 16 groups.
plan_business_footer: For networks that want to scale seriously
payment_completed_text: Your subscription is active. You can continue normally.
payment_failed_text: We could not finalize activation yet. If this persists, contact support with your payment reference.
payment_pending_text: We are finalizing your plan activation. This usually takes a few seconds and the page updates automatically.
sales_proof_activation_text: After payment, Whappi tracks the transaction and activates the plan as soon as GeniusPay confirms.
sales_proof_plans_text: Each plan only shows deliverable features: groups, moderation, AI, and scheduled messages.
sales_proof_support_text: If there is a delay, keep the payment reference: admin can verify the transaction.
